sentences.english: Excuse me, I live in the apartment right below yours.
Actually, I wanted to talk to you about the noise late at night.
sentences.korean: 사실 밤늦게 나는 소음에 대해 이야기하고 싶었어요.

sentences.english: There's been a lot of loud music past midnight several nights this week.
sentences.korean: 이번 주 여러 밤에 자정 넘어서 큰 음악 소리가 많이 났어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Asking for Help at a Store

sentences.english: I've been working on a music project and I completely lost track of time.
sentences.korean: 음악 프로젝트를 하고 있었는데 시간 가는 줄 전혀 몰랐어요.

sentences.english: I understand that creative work takes time.
sentences.korean: 창작 작업에 시간이 걸리는 건 이해해요.

sentences.english: But could you maybe use headphones after ten PM?
sentences.korean: 하지만 밤 10시 이후에는 헤드폰을 사용해주실 수 있나요?

sentences.english: I'll make sure to keep it down from now on.
